creator: sbruno@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Sylvain Garrigues from comment #11)
Just to be clear, qemu-system (full emulation) support ARMv7 right now.  The issue is emulating ARMv7 specific syscalls, which nobody is working on.

Working tree that the port is based on is here:
https://github.com/seanbruno/qemu-bsd-user/tree/bsd-user
